name: codex-session-manager
description: Supervise, inspect, resume, unblock, verify, redirect, and hand off Codex/coding-agent sessions as a session steward using sessions_list, sessions_history, and sessions_send.

interface.shortDescription: Supervise, inspect, resume, unblock, verify, redirect, and hand off Codex/coding-agent sessions as a session steward using sessions_list, sessions_history, and sessions_send.
interface.longDescription: Inspect a coding-agent session's history before acting, then send one bounded, state-aware instruction and require evidence before declaring completion.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Codex Session Manager safely.
